name: openwar3
description: Browser-first, asset-compatible re-creation of the Warcraft III engine (TypeScript). Ships zero Blizzard assets.

scripts.jass:test: tsc -p tools/tsconfig.jass.json && node tools/jass-audience-test.cjs && node tools/jass-chat-test.cjs && node tools/jass-corpus-test.cjs
scripts.sim:test: tsc -p tools/tsconfig.sim.json && node tools/sim-targeting-test.cjs && node tools/sim-item-regen-test.cjs && node tools/sim-spells-test.cjs && node tools/sim-death-blast-test.cjs && node tools/sim-detection-test.cjs && node tools/sim-vision-test.cjs && node tools/sim-shadowmeld-test.cjs && node tools/sim-root-test.cjs && node tools/sim-morph-test.cjs && node tools/sim-aura-test.cjs && node tools/sim-order-funnel-test.cjs && node tools/sim-jass-hooks-test.cjs && node tools/sim-minimap-test.cjs && node tools/sim-snapshot-test.cjs && node tools/sim-apply-test.cjs && node tools/sim-wire-test.cjs && node tools/lobby-test.cjs && node tools/sim-determinism-test.cjs
